title: W6 counseling roadmap acceptance fixture
overview: W6 template probe overview: bounded and revisable counseling roadmap.
phases: W6 template probe phases: engagement and assessment; deepening and hypothesis testing; consolidation.
hypotheses_to_verify: W6 template probe hypothesis: criticism may activate shame and avoidance, pending counselor verification.
session_focus_options: W6 template probe focus: clarify the latest criticism trigger and choose a phase-appropriate focus.
risk_monitoring_checkpoints: W6 template probe risk: re-check ideation, self-harm, sleep deterioration, supports, and functioning.
collaboration_or_referral_reminders: W6 template probe referral: consider collaboration only for new safety, psychiatric, or medical concerns.
missing_information: W6 template probe missing: prior counseling response and support follow-through are not documented.
do_not_do: W6 template probe do-not-do: do not diagnose, promise outcomes, or prescribe a fixed protocol.
boundary_notes: W6 template probe boundary: counselor-facing roadmap only, adjusted by counselor judgment.
